rulings.Case Title: JULIE GLANTZ VS. BAC HOME LOANS SERVICING, LP et al
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, February 28, 2012, line 1. DEFENDANT QUALITY LOAN SERVICE CORPORATION's DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT sustained with leave to amend as to 11th cause of action. Overruled as to the 6 and 12th cause of action. (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: MOHAMMADREZA HELALI VS. WELLS FARGO HOME MORTGAGE et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion To Dismiss Action And For Entry Of Judgment And For Failure To Amend; Memo P/A; Declaration
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, February 28, 2012, line 2. DEFENDANT WELLS FARGO HOME MORTGAGE's Motion To Dismiss Action And For Entry Of Judgment And For Failure To Amend Grant. Subject to opposition. (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: EMIL P MILYAKOV et al VS. JP MORGAN CHASE, NA et al

rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, February 28, 2012, line 3. DEFENDANT CALIFORNIA RECONVEYANCE CO., MORTGAGE ELECTRONIC REGISTRATION SYSTEMS, INC., MERSCORP, INC., JPMORGAN CHASE BANK's Motion To Stay Proceedings Grant - duplicative case in Federal Court. (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: JOHN STEWART COMPANY VS. KATRINA BUCHMANN
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, February 28, 2012, line 4. DEFENDANT KATRINA BUCHMANN's MOTION FOR SET ASIDE/VACATE JUDGMENT Deny - doesn't meet excusable neglect. (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: GOLDEN TIGER LLC, A CALIFORNIA LIMITED LIABILITY VS. BURDETTE GREEN et al
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, February 28, 2012, line 5. DEFENDANT BURDETTE GREEN's MOTION FOR SET ASIDE/VACATE JUDGMENT Grant - subject to posting rent and answer on file forthwith. (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: 1045 MISSION, LP VS. MARIBETH RATON et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, February 28, 2012, line 6. DEFENDANT MARIBETH RATON's MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND Grant. Subject to posting rent and answer to be filed. (501/REQ)
